The '''''Osprey''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], more specifically the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]]. It was first used when [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was set up by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] and had called for backup. Its next sighting was when the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Harpago]]'', under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]], tried to trap a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] squadron which had [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] as one of the pilots. The ''Osprey'' picked up Darth Vader and, after the ''Harpago's'' destruction, escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
